      "versionNonce": 1000971675,
      "isDeleted": false,
      "boundElements": [],
      "updated": 1784745037876,
      "link": null,
      "locked": false,
      "text": "Player is a bomb, destructible environment, each death advances the level. Player is scored on time. \nFire enemy that explodes player, follows them fog of war?\nTop down birds eye perspective\nLava that falls down vertically\nCount down to players death, each second is one tile traveled\nPlayer can collect extra wicks to extend life\nFailstate is player unable to reach exit",
      "fontSize": 20,
      "fontFamily": 5,
      "textAlign": "left",
      "verticalAlign": "top",
      "containerId": null,
      "originalText": "Player is a bomb, destructible environment, each death advances the level. Player is scored on time. \nFire enemy that explodes player, follows them fog of war?\nTop down birds eye perspective\nLava that falls down vertically\nCount down to players death, each second is one tile traveled\nPlayer can collect extra wicks to extend life\nFailstate is player unable to reach exit",
      "autoResize": true,
      "lineHeight": 1.25
    },
